title: ECSA: EU ETS Directive review should mandate Member States to use some ETS revenues for shipping’s decarbonisation
summary: The European Community Shipowners' Associations (ECSA) advocates mandating EU Member States to re-allocate ETS revenues for shipping decarbonisation. This proposal, while seemingly progressive, raises concerns about deflecting direct industry responsibility for immediate emissions reductions. True progress demands that ship operators drastically cut carbon intensity and comply with FuelEU Maritime targets, rather than rely on redistributed funds.
